libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native test runtime on JDK 25/GraalVM, set runtime system properties equivalent to -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Prefer local loopback HTTP-server tests using Vertx.createHttpServer() plus WebClient/WebClientSession/CachingWebClient; avoid remote network dependencies. Do not exercise OAuth2WebClient unless the test also adds the optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 dependency intentionally.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The failing issue is for native-image runtime, so local Gradle/native-image verification remains necessary to confirm the Netty Java 25 properties are sufficient for 5.0.1.
OAuth2WebClient references optional Vert.x OAuth2 APIs; generated tests that import or instantiate it without adding the optional dependency may fail to compile.
External HTTP endpoints would make coverage flaky; use an in-process Vert.x server instead.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency or Docker service is needed: Vert.x Web Client can be meaningfully exercised against an in-process Vert.x HTTP server. However, vertx-web-client 5.0.1 resolves Vert.x Core with Netty 4.2.2.Final, and the existing 5.0.0 test already documents that Netty 4.2.x needs explicit unsafe-access runtime properties on Java 25 native runs.
